message.content: @startuml skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0 skinparam classBackgroundColor #F5F5F5 skinparam classBorderColor black skinparam classFontName Arial skinparam classFontSize 14 class App { + NameSorter sorter + App prog + getInput() } class NameSorter { + ArrayList names + addToList() + sortList() + printList() } note right of App App - Main application class - Contains a NameSorter instance - Has a static main method (prog) - Provides input handling via getInput() end note note right of NameSorter NameSorter - Manages a list of names - Supports adding, sorting, and printing names - Uses ArrayList for storage end note @enduml
